rdf:Description.rdamd:P30137: F 11111nam a2200553ui 4500 F001 500duplicates-test F245 10 $9 TITLE STATEMENT (NR) $a Title (NR) $b Remainder of title (NR) $b Remainder of title (NR) $c Statement of responsibility, etc. (NR) $c Statement of responsibility, etc. (NR) $d Designation of section (SE) [OBSOLETE] $d Designation of section (SE) [OBSOLETE] $e Name of part/section (SE) [OBSOLETE] $e Name of part/section (SE) [OBSOLETE] $f Inclusive dates (NR) $f Inclusive dates (NR) $g Bulk dates (NR) $g Bulk dates (NR) $h Medium (NR) $h Medium (NR) $k Form (R) $k Form (R) $n Number of part/section of a work (R) $n Number of part/section of a work (R) $p Name of part/section of a work (R) $p Name of part/section of a work (R) $s Version (NR) $s Version (NR) F246 30 $9 VARYING FORM OF TITLE (R) $a Title proper/short title (NR) $a Title proper/short title (NR) $b Remainder of title (NR) $b Remainder of title (NR) $d Designation of section (SE) [OBSOLETE] $d Designation of section (SE) [OBSOLETE] $e Name of part/section (SE) [OBSOLETE] $e Name of part/section (SE) [OBSOLETE] $f Date or sequential designation (NR) $f Date or sequential designation (NR) $g Miscellaneous information (R) $g Miscellaneous information (R) $h Medium (NR) $h Medium (NR) $i Display text (NR) $i Display text (NR) $n Number of part/section of a work (R) $n Number of part/section of a work (R) $p Name of part/section of a work (R) $p Name of part/section of a work (R) $5 Institution to which field applies (NR) $5 Institution to which field applies (NR) F247 ## $9 FORMER TITLE (R) $a Title (NR) $a Title (NR) $b Remainder of title (NR) $b Remainder of title (NR) $d Designation of section (SE) [OBSOLETE] $d Designation of section (SE) [OBSOLETE] $e Name of part/section (SE) [OBSOLETE] $e Name of part/section (SE) [OBSOLETE] $f Date or sequential designation (NR) $f Date or sequential designation (NR) $g Miscellaneous information (R) $g Miscellaneous information (R) $h Medium (NR) $h Medium (NR) $n Number of part/section of a work (R) $n Number of part/section of a work (R) $p Name of part/section of a work (R) $p Name of part/section of a work (R) $x International Standard Serial Number (NR) $x International Standard Serial Number (NR) F250 ## $9 Edition, Imprint, etc. Fields 250-270-\- $a Edition statement (NR) $a Edition statement (NR) $b Remainder of edition statement (NR) $b Remainder of edition statement (NR) $3 Materials specified (NR) $3 Materials specified (NR) F251 ## $9 VERSION INFORMATION (R) $a Version (R) $a Version (R) $0 Authority record control number or standard number (R) $0 Authority record control number or standard number (R) $1 Real World Object URI (R) $1 Real World Object URI (R) $2 Source (NR) $2 Source (NR) $3 Materials specified (NR) $3 Materials specified (NR) F254 ## $9 MUSICAL PRESENTATION STATEMENT (NR) $a Musical presentation statement (NR) $a Musical presentation statement (NR) F255 ## $9 CARTOGRAPHIC MATHEMATICAL DATA (R) $a Statement of scale (NR) $a Statement of scale (NR) $b Statement of projection (NR) $b Statement of projection (NR) $c Statement of coordinates (NR) $c Statement of coordinates (NR) $d Statement of zone (NR) $d Statement of zone (NR) $e Statement of equinox (NR) $e Statement of equinox (NR) $f Outer G-ring coordinate pairs (NR) $f Outer G-ring coordinate pairs (NR) $g Exclusion G-ring coordinate pairs (NR) $g Exclusion G-ring coordinate pairs (NR) F256 ## $9 COMPUTER FILE CHARACTERISTICS (NR) $a Computer file characteristics (NR) $a Computer file characteristics (NR) F257 ## $9 COUNTRY OF PRODUCING ENTITY (R) $a Country of producing entity (R) $a Country of producing entity (R) $0 Authority record control number or standard number (R) $0 Authority record control number or standard number (R) $1 Real World Object URI (R) $1 Real World Object URI (R) $2 Source (NR) $2 Source (NR) F258 ## $9 PHILATELIC ISSUE DATE (R) $a Issuing jurisdiction (NR) $a Issuing jurisdiction (NR) $b Denomination (NR) $b Denomination (NR) F260 ## $9 PUBLICATION, DISTRIBUTION, ETC. (IMPRINT) (R) $a Place of publication, distribution, etc. (R) $a Place of publication, distribution, etc. (R) $b Name of publisher, distributor, etc. (R) $b Name of publisher, distributor, etc. (R) $c Date of publication, distribution, etc. (R) $c Date of publication, distribution, etc. (R) $d Plate or publisher's number for music (Pre-AACR 2) (NR) [LOCAL] $d Plate or publisher's number for music (Pre-AACR 2) (NR) [LOCAL] $e Place of manufacture (R) $e Place of manufacture (R) $f Manufacturer (R) $f Manufacturer (R) $g Date of manufacture (R) $g Date of manufacture (R) $3 Materials specified (NR) $3 Materials specified (NR) F261 ## $9 IMPRINT STATEMENT FOR FILMS (Pre-AACR 1 Revised) (NR) [LOCAL] $a Producing company (R) $a Producing company (R) $b Releasing company (primary distributor) (R) $b Releasing company (primary distributor) (R) $d Date of production, release, etc. (R) $d Date of production, release, etc. (R) $e Contractual producer (R) $e Contractual producer (R) $f Place of production, release, etc. (R) $f Place of production, release, etc. (R) F262 ## $9 IMPRINT STATEMENT FOR SOUND RECORDINGS (Pre-AACR 2) (NR) [LOCAL] $a Place of production, release, etc. (NR) $a Place of production, release, etc. (NR) $b Publisher or trade name (NR) $b Publisher or trade name (NR) $c Date of production, release, etc. (NR) $c Date of production, release, etc. (NR) $k Serial identification (NR) $k Serial identification (NR) $l Matrix and/or take number (NR) $l Matrix and/or take number (NR) F263 ## $9 PROJECTED PUBLICATION DATE (NR) $a Projected publication date (NR) $a Projected publication date (NR) F264 ## $9 PRODUCTION, PUBLICATION, DISTRIBUTION, MANUFACTURE, AND COPYRIGHT NOTICE (R) $a Place of production, publication, distribution, manufacture (R) $a Place of production, publication, distribution, manufacture (R) $b Name of producer, publisher, distributor, manufacturer (R) $b Name of producer, publisher, distributor, manufacturer (R) $c Date of production, publication, distribution, manufacture, or copyright notice (R) $c Date of production, publication, distribution, manufacture, or copyright notice (R) $3 Materials specified (NR) $3 Materials specified (NR) $6 Linkage (NR) F265 ## $9 SOURCE FOR ACQUISITION/SUBSCRIPTION ADDRESS (NR) [OBSOLETE] $a Source for acquisition/subscription address (R) $a Source for acquisition/subscription address (R) F270 ## $9 ADDRESS (R) $a Address (R) $a Address (R) $b City (NR) $b City (NR) $c State or province (NR) $c State or province (NR) $d Country (NR) $d Country (NR) $e Postal code (NR) $e Postal code (NR) $f Terms preceding attention name (NR) $f Terms preceding attention name (NR) $g Attention name (NR) $g Attention name (NR) $h Attention position (NR) $h Attention position (NR) $i Type of address (NR) $i Type of address (NR) $j Specialized telephone number (R) $j Specialized telephone number (R) $k Telephone number (R) $k Telephone number (R) $l Fax number (R) $l Fax number (R) $m Electronic mail address (R) $m Electronic mail address (R) $n TDD or TTY number (R) $n TDD or TTY number (R) $p Contact person (R) $p Contact person (R) $q Title of contact person (R) $q Title of contact person (R) $r Hours (R) $r Hours (R) $z Public note (R) $z Public note (R) $4 Relationship (R) $4 Relationship (R) F336 ## $1 http://rdaregistry.info/termList/RDAContentType/1020
